name: Texarkana Style Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat corn oil in a large skillet over moderate flame.
2. Add beef, onion, and garlic to the skillet.
3. Saute for 10 minutes or until well-drained.
4. In a saucepan over medium flame, combine flour, chile powder, salt, and cumin.
5. Gradually whisk in hot water, mixing well.
6. Stir the mixture into the beef combination, mixing thoroughly.
7. Pour into a cassarole dish.
8. Bake covered at 350 degrees for 60 minutes.
9. Stir in beans and mix well.
10. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees for an additional 30 minutes.
11. Serve hot.
